title: What I think about the Military Industrial Complex

transcript.text: Hello. This video is what I think about the military industrial complex. Okay, we need to spend a lot less money on our military. I don't know how much we spend, but everybody knows it's a whole bunch of money.

Um, we have got 40,000 troops, American troops, in Korea. That's a waste of money. I say we bring them all home. We don't need any of those suckers. Somebody might go, oh, but Seoul's right on the border. North Korea's got a million-man army. They're going to come and take over Korea. No, they're not. They can't do that.
We've got, uh, we've got, um, aircraft carriers that'll be there in a day. That could kick their ass. Just bomb them. Bomb all the troops. Snipe all the troops. It's not going to happen.

Um, bring them home, all 40,000 of them. Close down, what is it, three bases we have in Germany? Close them all down. What the hell are we doing with bases in Germany? We're friends with Russia. Germany's like our best friend. What the fuck are we doing with all those troops in Germany? We don't need them. Bring them all home. It's just a waste of money.

Um, and all those other bases. I don't even know what their bases are. I think our aircraft carriers are good enough. Um, we spend way too much money on that stuff. So my vote is bring all, bring all of them home.
